recommendation.primary: Build a thin custom TypeScript MCP server (5-8 tools) over SQLite + better-sqlite3 v12.8.0. Two node types (SourceNode + KnowledgeNode), four edge types, M2M junction tags, separate node_metadata confidence table. FTS5-only search in v1. Include 384d embedding column with NULLs in v1 DDL.
recommendation.confidence: MEDIUM-HIGH (pending Neuromcp audit OQ-16 and query pattern audit OQ-17)
recommendation.mvp: scripts/t28/migrate.js bootstraps existing corpus → t28 sync for daily absorb → t28 query for FTS5 search + subgraph serialization → /graph-checkpoint for 15-entry maintenance.
avoid: Graphiti/Zep (requires Python + LLM per write + Docker)
mem0 (graph is add-on requiring extra LLM calls per operation)
Neo4j/Memgraph/ArangoDB (server-hosted, no Docker for solo dev)
LadybugDB as v1 or v2 primary (HIGH risk — Kuzu archived, 3-way fork split, package is lbug not @ladybug/core)
